languages.original_text: "However, if one were to overlook these pessimistic predictions and proceed from the hypothesis that escape from this place is even possible, then our best bet is to seize upon the xenos' infighting. During my time as a subject of the Haemonculus's experiments, I came to the conclusion that pride and envy are inherent not only to him, but to his entire accursed species as a whole. The xenos will scheme and connive — there is no question about that. The only question is: when will he be caught in his own web of intrigue? Hypothetically, that will be our chance."

languages.text: "Впрочем, если отринуть пессиместичные прогнозы и исходить из гипотезы, что бегство отсюда вообще возможно, то лучшая ставка — воспользоваться сварами ксеносов. За время бытия объектом экспериментов гемункула, я сделал вывод, что гордыня и зависть свойственны не только ему, но и всему его проклятому виду в целом. Нет вопроса будет ли он плести интриги — вопрос лишь в том, когда их паутина утащит его на дно. Гипотетически, это и будет нашим шансом".

"However, if one were to overlook these pessimistic predictions and proceed from the hypothesis that escape from this place is even possible, then our best bet is to seize upon the xenos' infighting. During my time as a subject of the Haemonculus's experiments, I came to the conclusion that pride and envy are inherent not only to him, but to his entire accursed species as a whole. The xenos will scheme and connive — there is no question about that. The only question is: when will he be caught in his own web of intrigue? Hypothetically, that will be our chance."

languages.text: «No obstante, de ignorar estas predicciones pesimistas y actuar en base a la hipótesis remota de que es posible escapar de este lugar, nuestra mejor opción radica en los conflictos interinos de los xenos. Durante mi período como sujeto de pruebas del Hemónculo, llegué a la conclusión de que el orgullo y la envidia no son solo características personales suyas, sino comunes a toda su repulsiva especie. Los xenos maquinan y se confabulan, de eso no hay duda. La única pregunta es cuándo acabará él atrapado en su propia red de intrigas. Hipotéticamente, esa será nuestra oportunidad».
languages.original_text: "However, if one were to overlook these pessimistic predictions and proceed from the hypothesis that escape from this place is even possible, then our best bet is to seize upon the xenos' infighting. languages.text: “然而，如果忽略这些悲观的预测，姑且假设逃离此地是可能的，那么我们最好的办法是利用异形之间的内讧。在我作为血伶人实验对象时，我得出了一个结论：傲慢和嫉妒不只是他的特质，也是那个可恶种族的通病。阴谋算计是他们的本性，这一点毫无疑问。唯一的问题是：他何时会被自己的阴谋之网反噬？理论上来说，那一刻就是我们的机会。”
languages.original_text: "However, if one were to overlook these pessimistic predictions and proceed from the hypothesis that escape from this place is even possible, then our best bet is to seize upon the xenos' infighting. During my time as a subject of the Haemonculus's experiments, I came to the conclusion that pride and envy are inherent not only to him, but to his entire accursed species as a whole. The xenos will scheme and connive — there is no question about that. The only question is: when will he be caught in his own web of intrigue? Hypothetically, that will be our chance."

traits.locale_text: “然而，如果忽略这些悲观的预测，姑且假设逃离此地是可能的，那么我们最好的办法是利用异形之间的内讧。在我作为血伶人实验对象时，我得出了一个结论：傲慢和嫉妒不只是他的特质，也是那个可恶种族的通病。阴谋算计是他们的本性，这一点毫无疑问。唯一的问题是：他何时会被自己的阴谋之网反噬？理论上来说，那一刻就是我们的机会。”

languages.text: « Néanmoins, si vous étiez {mf|disposé|disposée} à ignorer ces conjectures pessimistes et à croire qu'une fuite est réellement possible, alors notre meilleure chance consisterait à profiter des luttes intestines entre les xénos. Lors des expériences de l'hémoncule dont j'ai été le cobaye, je suis arrivé à la conclusion que la fierté et l'envie sont deux sentiments inhérents non seulement pour lui, mais aussi pour tout son peuple maudit. Les xénos finiront toujours par comploter, quoi qu'il arrive. Ne reste donc qu'une seule question : quand finira-t-il par être pris dans sa propre intrigue ? Théoriquement, c'est là qu'il faudra saisir notre chance. »
languages.original_text: "However, if one were to overlook these pessimistic predictions and proceed from the hypothesis that escape from this place is even possible, then our best bet is to seize upon the xenos' infighting. During my time as a subject of the Haemonculus's experiments, I came to the conclusion that pride and envy are inherent not only to him, but to his entire accursed species as a whole. The xenos will scheme and connive — there is no question about that. The only question is: when will he be caught in his own web of intrigue? Hypothetically, that will be our chance."

traits.locale_text: « Néanmoins, si vous étiez {mf|disposé|disposée} à ignorer ces conjectures pessimistes et à croire qu'une fuite est réellement possible, alors notre meilleure chance consisterait à profiter des luttes intestines entre les xénos. Lors des expériences de l'hémoncule dont j'ai été le cobaye, je suis arrivé à la conclusion que la fierté et l'envie sont deux sentiments inhérents non seulement pour lui, mais aussi pour tout son peuple maudit. Les xénos finiront toujours par comploter, quoi qu'il arrive. Ne reste donc qu'une seule question : quand finira-t-il par être pris dans sa propre intrigue ? Théoriquement, c'est là qu'il faudra saisir notre chance. »

languages.text: "Würde man diese pessimistischen Prognosen allerdings ignorieren und von der Hypothese ausgehen, dass die Flucht von diesem Ort möglich ist, sollten wir wohl auf interne Querelen der Xenos hoffen. Während meiner Zeit als Subjekt der Experimente des Haemonculus kam ich zu dem Schluss, dass Stolz und Neid nicht nur ihm, sondern seiner ganzen verfluchten Spezies innewohnen. Der Xenos wird Ränke schmieden und sich verschwören ... daran besteht kein Zweifel. Die einzige Frage ist: Wann wird er sich in seinem eigenen Netz aus Intrigen verstricken? Das wäre nämlich aus hypothetischer Sicht unsere Chance."
languages.original_text: "However, if one were to overlook these pessimistic predictions and proceed from the hypothesis that escape from this place is even possible, then our best bet is to seize upon the xenos' infighting. languages.text: 「しかし、これらの悲観的な予測を見過ごし、この場所からの脱出が可能であるという仮説から話を進めるとすれば、最善の策は異星人の内紛を利用することである。ヘモンクルスの実験台になっている間に、プライドと嫉妬はヘモンクルスだけでなく、呪われた種族全体に内在しているという結論に達した。ゼノスは策略をめぐらし、陰謀をめぐらす。唯一の問題は、彼がいつ自らの陰謀の網にかかるかだ。仮定の話だが、それが我々のチャンスだ」。
languages.original_text: "However, if one were to overlook these pessimistic predictions and proceed from the hypothesis that escape from this place is even possible, then our best bet is to seize upon the xenos' infighting. During my time as a subject of the Haemonculus's experiments, I came to the conclusion that pride and envy are inherent not only to him, but to his entire accursed species as a whole. The xenos will scheme and connive — there is no question about that. The only question is: when will he be caught in his own web of intrigue? Hypothetically, that will be our chance."

languages.text: "Ancak bu karamsar tahminleri göz ardı eder ve bu yerden kaçmanın mümkün olduğu hipotezinden yola çıkarsak... O zaman en iyi seçeneğimiz, zenoların iç çatışmasından faydalanmak olacaktır. Haimonkulus'un deneylerinde denek olarak geçirdiğim süre zarfında gurur ve kıskançlığın sadece ona değil, lanetlenmiş türünün tamamına özgü olduğu sonucuna vardım. Zeno, entrika ve fesatlık yapacak. Buna şüphe yok. Asıl soru şu: Kendi entrika ağına ne zaman düşecek? Varsayımsal olarak o vakit geldiğinde bundan faydalanmalıyız."
